visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a light blue bucket hat, a white long-sleeve top, and a denim overall dress stands in a warehouse-style supermarket aisle. She gestures enthusiastically with her hands while looking directly at the camera, exhibiting a wide smile. Behind her are tall stacks of brown and white boxes labeled "Baumkuchen" with images of chocolate ring cakes. A large red and blue "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) The camera switches to a close-up shot of the product packaging. The boxes feature a high-quality image of a dark chocolate cake with several slices removed, revealing the interior texture. The text on the box includes "BAUMKUCHEN Hokkaido Japan" and "Chocolate." The lighting is bright and industrial, characteristic of a supermarket. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting. Two women sit at a table. The woman from the previous scene now wears a red bucket hat and a yellow striped shirt. Next to her is a woman with long dark hair wearing a dark purple top. They hold individually wrapped chocolate cake pieces and a large outer packaging bag. The background shows a domestic living room with a white shelf containing books and a yellow plush toy. (4) A close-up shot displays five slices of dark chocolate ring cake arranged in a circle on a red decorative plate. The layers of the cake are visible. The women's hands are seen pointing at the cake. (5) Back to the two women at the table. They continue talking to the camera, holding up the packaged cake slices. Various colorful text overlays appear, including a purple and pink box highlighting "Highest chocolate concentration."
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 跑兩趟才買到. [Variety]: 巧克力年輪蛋糕. (2) [Subtitle]: 終於被我找到了. (3) [Subtitle]: 上次沒有買到. (4) [Subtitle]: 原味的年輪蛋糕現在出巧克力口味. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且聽說是苦甜. (6) [Subtitle]: 我最喜歡苦甜的. (7) [Subtitle]: 苦甜的蛋糕. (8) [Subtitle]: 回去看看值不值得. (9) [Subtitle]: 我覺得現吃的. (10) [Subtitle]: 要麼超好吃. (11) [Subtitle]: 要麼會讓我很傷心. (12) [Subtitle]: 巧克力年輪蛋糕. [Variety]: 巧克力年輪蛋糕. (13) [Subtitle]: 總共有32入 329元. (14) [Subtitle]: 有四個袋子包裝. (15) [Subtitle]: 一打開以後要冰冰箱. (16) [Subtitle]: 它這樣子一顆是10塊錢. (17) [Subtitle]: 覺得它是我們吃過. [Variety]: 巧克力濃度最高. (18) [Subtitle]: 而且是那種苦醇的蛋糕. (19) [Subtitle]: 本身非常地柔軟. (20) [Subtitle]: 也濕潤只是沒有層層分明. (21) [Subtitle]: 可是我們覺得它已經非常的合格了. (22) [Subtitle]: 冷藏後應該會更好吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 因為它的糕體可能會變得更Q彈. (24) [Subtitle]: 對 但這個價格的話. (25) [Subtitle]: 我們覺得非常值得買. (26) [Subtitle]: 如果你原味吃膩的話. (27) [Subtitle]: 巧克力味不要錯過.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a light blue or red bucket hat and a white/yellow top with overalls. The other has long dark hair and a purple blouse.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set in a Costco warehouse with industrial shelves and bulk product stacks. The second half is a brightly lit home living room with a white shelf and household items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins a rapid narration with high emotional arousal. The background music is an upbeat, high-tempo pop track featuring strong electronic beats and bright synthesizer textures. The mix is clean with minimal environmental floor. (2) A sharp "whoosh" sound effect triggers a transition. The narrator's pitch rises as she emphasizes the find. The BGM maintains a steady 4/4 rhythm. (3) A "pop" sound effect signals a change in phase. A second female voice joins in a slightly lower, more conversational pitch. Both voices overlap occasionally, creating a lively atmosphere. (4) Frequent "dings" and soft percussive sound effects coincide with text appearing on screen. The sound of plastic rustling is clearly audible as the speakers handle the product packaging. (5) The energetic BGM continues at a consistent volume underneath the continuous dialogue. The voices maintain a positive and cheerful valence until the track reaches a hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Product Detail -> Tasting/Review -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly energetic and positive review of a new chocolate Baumkuchen cake found at Costco. The video aims to inform viewers about the price, quantity, and taste profile (bittersweet chocolate) while encouraging them to purchase it if they enjoyed the original version.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logos (Costco, Kenji) and a detailed review of product specifications including price and packaging.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media food vlog characterized by fast-paced editing, bright lighting, and high-energy narration tailored for quick consumption and high engagement.
